usage: add_gui_text [-help] [-alignment {upperLeft centerLeft lowerLeft upperCenter centerCenter lowerCenter upperRight centerRight lowerRight}] -label <text> -layer <layerName> {-box {x1 y1 x2 y2} | {{-height <height> | -fixed_height <fixHeight> } -pt {x y} [-orient <dir>]}} [ -box {x1 y1 x2 y2} [-no_bbox ] ]

options.name: -alignment
options.description: {upperLeft centerLeft lowerLeft upperCenter centerCenter lowerCenter upperRight centerRight lowerRight} specify the alignment of the font

options.name: -box
options.description: Coordinates of the lower-left and upper-right points of the rectangle (values are in microns)

options.name: -layer
options.description: GUI layer name to use or create for the text. If the specified layer does not exist, it will be automatically created.

options.name: -no_bbox
options.description: Not draw bounding box when -box option is sepcified

options.name: -orient
options.description: The dir contains MX MX90 MY MY90 R0 R90 R180 R270

options.name: -pt
options.description: The origin coordinate of the text (values are in microns)
